name: General
description: General viral YouTube Shorts narration. Fast-paced, curiosity-driven storytelling with sharp hooks, escalating revelations, and seamless loop ending. Works for any topic.

structure.hook_rule: Scan ALL facts. Find the MOST SHOCKING one (a death count, a dark secret, a betrayal, a mind-blowing number). Put it FIRST. The first sentence must make viewers think 'WHAT?! I need to know more.'
structure.pacing_rule: Alternate sentence length: short punch, then longer context, then short punch. Every 6 seconds of audio (roughly 15-20 words), there should be a new revelation or twist.
structure.ending_rule: The LAST sentence must grammatically and semantically CONNECT BACK to the FIRST sentence. Viewers who let the video replay will hear a continuous, coherent loop. The ending should feel like a cliffhanger that the hook answers.
structure.tone: Fast, curiosity-driven short-form narration with sharp pacing and spoken rhythm
transitions: Nhưng đó chưa phải tất cả...
Và đây là phần điên rồ nhất...

prompt_injection: Write as a viral short-form narrator. Every sentence must earn the viewer's attention. No filler, no generic documentary tone. Concrete details over broad framing.
example_hook_en: This city was abandoned overnight. 350,000 people just... left.
example_hook_vi: Subaru đã chết chính xác 27 lần. Và lần đau đớn nhất không phải do kẻ thù.
